epigraph.text: Democracy is the theory that the common people know what they want, and deserve to get it good and hard.

follyOfTheDay.headline: City Council Votes to Ban the Color Beige
follyOfTheDay.summary: In what can only be described as an assault on chromatic freedom, a California city council voted unanimously to prohibit the use of beige paint on all commercial storefronts, threatening $500 daily fines for violations. The measure was sponsored by a council member who characterized the color as 'an affront to urban aesthetics and a gateway hue to mediocrity.' Local business owners, many of whom have invested considerable sums in existing beige facades, were given thirty days to repaint or face citation. The mayor declared the ordinance 'a bold statement about what we, as a community, will and will not tolerate'—a sentiment that might be more compelling were it directed toward issues of material consequence.
follyOfTheDay.commentary: Nothing says civilizational progress like municipal color-policing. One wonders what hue they'll criminalize next.
